---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: fallout0wl

---

### What
Describe the issue clearly

### Affected page(s)
Please provide the name of the page + type (company, game, funding etc.) or a direct link

### Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen

### Screenshot
Add a screenshot to visualize the problem, optional, delete if empty

### Additional context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here, delete if empty)

### Type of device
On what browser are you viewing the website? Screen ration? (if relevant to the issue)
